title: CandidateNominatedPayload
description: A candidacy registered. Organic candidacies are caused by a GovernanceRequested{declare_candidacy} (causationId = that command's eventId); operator-seeded candidacies (POST /elections convenience) are roots (causationId null). Carries villagerId so consumers never need the candidates-table surrogate id to say who is running. Producer: government-service on government.events, aggregate = the Election.

candidateId.description: The candidates-table row id (referenced by VoteCast.candidateId and ElectionDecided.winnerCandidateId).

platform.description: The campaign promise; null for operator-seeded candidates.
